prestazioni: Upgrade to a **Garrett GTX3582R Gen II turbocharger** (82mm compressor wheel, 62mm turbine) paired with a **custom 3.5-inch stainless steel downpipe** (T4 flange, 4-bolt wastegate) to support the **SAIC 2.0L EA888 Gen4 (DHEA) engine**'s 300+ bar fuel system, targeting 550whp on E85 with a **Motec M150 ECU** (direct injection control, flex-fuel mapping, and knock detection via **Bosch LSU 4.9 wideband sensors**).

Install **Ferrea F6000 series intake and exhaust valves** (titanium retainers, Inconel springs) with **Supertech +1mm oversized pistons** (9.5:1 compression, forged Mahle slugs) and **Manley H-beam connecting rods** (ARP2000 bolts) to handle the **DHEA engine**'s 8,000 RPM redline under forced induction. Pair with a **Drexler limited-slip differential (LSD)** (45% lockup, 2-way ramp angles) for optimal torque vectoring.

Replace the stock **ZF 8-speed 8HP70 transmission** with a **Getrag 7DCL750 dual-clutch unit** (wet clutch, 750Nm torque capacity) and **Peloquin LSD** (1.5-way, carbon fiber plates) for faster shifts and durability. Add a **PWR Australia 450kW race-spec intercooler** (bar-and-plate, 1200cfm airflow) and **Mocal oil cooler (OC-100)** with **AN-10 braided lines** to manage the **DHEA engine**'s thermal load under track conditions.
estetica: Fit a **Liberty Walk LB-WORKS L7 Pro widebody kit** (carbon fiber fenders, 50mm extended wheel arches) with **custom 3D-printed ABS overfenders** (reinforced with aluminum honeycomb) to accommodate **Work Meister S1 3P 19x10.5 +35 (front) and 19x12 +40 (rear)** wheels wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R (275/35/19 front, 315/30/19 rear)** tires.

Install a **Seibon Carbon L7 Pro full carbon fiber hood** (dual heat extractors, 3K twill weave) with **custom LED daytime running lights (Osram LEDriving SL 1)** integrated into the front bumper. Replace the rear diffuser with a **Rocket Bunny V3-style carbon fiber unit** (3-piece, adjustable angle) and add **Aeromotions active rear wing** (dual-element, 1,200mm span, 30-degree attack angle).

Swap the stock interior for **Recaro Pole Position CS-II seats** (carbon fiber shells, Schroth 6-point harnesses) and a **MOMO Prototipo steering wheel** (suede, 350mm diameter, quick-release hub). Add a **custom roll cage (Chassisworks 8.5-point)** with **TIG-welded chromoly tubing** (1.75x0.120-inch) and **Sparco harness bar** for FIA compliance. Finish with **Vivid Racing carbon fiber door cards** (aluminum honeycomb core) and **AEM CD-7 dash display** (10-inch touchscreen, CAN bus integration).
